name: Fast and Festive Cookie Mix
recipeIngredient: 6 cups Pillsbury BEST All Purpose Flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly spoon flour into a measuring cup and level off.
2. In a 4-quart bowl or container, combine half of the flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt by scooping them in.
3. Using a fork or pastry blender, cut in half of the butter into the mixture until it reaches a consistency of coarse crumbs.
4. Repeat steps 2-3 with the remaining ingredients.
5. Transfer the mix to a tightly covered container.
6. Store in the refrigerator or freezer and use within 4 weeks.
7. Measure by dipping a cup into the mix and leveling off.
8. Return any unused mix to the refrigerator or freezer.
9. Allow measured mix to come to room temperature before adding additional ingredients as directed in recipes.
TIP: To prepare the cookie mix in a food processor, place half of each of the flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, and butter into the food processor bowl with the metal blade. Process until it reaches a consistency of coarse crumbs. Transfer to a tightly covered container. Repeat with the remaining ingredients.
